meta.title: Marlowe & Associates — Vancouver
meta.description: Family-owned estate planning and probate practice in Vancouver, BC. Quiet, careful work for two generations.

business.name: Marlowe & Associates
business.tagline: Estate planning & probate in Vancouver, since 1968.

data.headline: A practice built on quiet diligence.
data.subhead: Helping Vancouver families navigate wills, trusts, and probate for over fifty years. Confidential consultations, fixed fees, no pressure.
trustItems: Members of the Law Society of BC

data.headline: Two generations of estate counsel in Vancouver.
data.narrative: Marlowe & Associates was founded in 1968 by James Marlowe, KC. Today the practice is led by his daughter, Eleanor Marlowe, supported by a team of four lawyers and three paralegals. We work with British Columbia families on wills, representation agreements, probate, and the careful preparation that makes inheritance straightforward rather than fraught.

data.headline: Focused on what families actually need.

items.title: Wills & Estate Planning
items.description: Comprehensive wills, representation agreements, and powers of attorney drafted to BC standards.

items.title: Probate & Estate Administration
items.description: Quiet, methodical administration of estates of every size — including the difficult ones.

items.title: Trust Structuring
items.description: Family trusts and continuation strategies that hold up across generations.

items.author: Margaret L.
items.text: Eleanor handled my mother's estate with extraordinary patience. The work was meticulous, the bills were exactly as quoted, and at no point did anyone make us feel rushed.

text.headline: We bill the way doctors do — for time, with clear estimates.
text.body: Most family-law firms bill by the hour with no commitment to a final number. We don't. Initial engagements are quoted as fixed fees with a written scope, and any change is discussed before work continues.

data.headline: Considering a will, or settling an estate?
data.subhead: Initial consultations are complimentary and confidential. We respond within one business day.

data.headline: We're downtown — and on the phone.
